assets.description: List of FRAX balance sheet assets.

liabilities.description: List of FRAX balance sheet liabilities.

batchId.description: The global unique ID of the ferry departure. When embarked transactions have not yet departed, this field will be `null`.

sourceChain.description: The name of the source blockchain/network.

destinationChain.description: The name of the destination blockchain/network.

startIndex.description: The start index of the transaction array from the other ferry contract that is included in a batch of this ferry.

numberOfTransactions.description: The total count transactions included in a ferry trip.

numberOfUsers.description: The unique count of users making a ferry trip.

numberOfRecipients.description: The unique count of recipients disembarking from ferry trips.

trip.description: Summary info for the specific Frax Ferry trip.

transactions.description: Array of Frax Ferry trip transactions.

sourceChain.description: The name of the source blockchain/network.

destinationChain.description: The name of the destination blockchain/network.

feeMin.description: The minimum fee subtracted from the quantity of the source token. Returned as a BigNumber.

feeMax.description: The maximum fee subtracted from the quantity of the source token. Returned as a BigNumber.

feeRate.description: The rate (per 10,000 and bounded by the min/max fee constants) used to calculate the fee that gets subtracted from the quantity of the source token. Returned as a BigNumber.

departIntervalSec.description: The minimum amount of time the ferry waits between departing.

disembarkIntervalSec.description: The minimum amount of time the ferry waits between disembarking.

items.description: Array of Frax Ferry summary information.

ferryInfo.description: Frax Ferry summary information. Contains two entries (one for each source chain).

trips.description: Frax Ferry trip details with transactions.

transactions.description: Array of Frax Ferry transaction information.

items.description: Array of Frax Ferry transaction volume information.

embarkTimestamp.description: The truncated date for the requested time unit grouping.Value is `null` when requesting all-time data

totalValueUsd.description: Sum of the value of the transactions at the time they embark (before fees)

totalFeesUsd.description: Sum of the value of the fees paid

decimals.description: The number of decimals for the ERC20 token. Typically is 18 or 6.

tvl.description: The latest total value (USD) locked for this token across all pools.

token0AmountLocked.description: The total quantity of token 0 locked in pool.

token0AmountLockedAmm.description: The quantity of token 0 locked in AMM reserves (excludes TWAMM).

token0AmountLockedTwamm.description: The quantity of token 0 locked in TWAMM reserves.

token1AmountLocked.description: The total quantity of token 1 locked in pool.

token1AmountLockedAmm.description: The quantity of token 1 locked in AMM reserves (excludes TWAMM).

token1AmountLockedTwamm.description: The quantity of token 1 locked in TWAMM reserves.

feePercentage.description: The average fee charged by the pool. Example: 0.40% returns 0.004.

tvl.description: The latest total value (USD) locked in the pool.

liquidityTransactionCount.description: The number of transactions where liquidity was added or removed.

swapTransactionCount.description: The number of transactions where tokens were swapped/exchanged.

liquidityUsdAmount.description: The total dollar value locked in the pool (USD).

tokenLockedAmount.description: The quantity of tokens locked in the pool.

liquidityTransactionCount.description: The number of transactions where liquidity was added or removed.

swapTransactionCount.description: The number of transactions where tokens were swapped/exchanged.

token0LiquidityUsdAmount.description: The total dollar value of the first token (token0) locked in the pool (USD).

token0LockedAmount.description: The quantity of the first token (token0) locked in the pool.

token1LiquidityUsdAmount.description: The total dollar value of the second token (token1) locked in the pool (USD).

token1LockedAmount.description: The quantity of the second token (token1) locked in the pool.

token0DeltaAmount.description: The change in quantity of token0. If being swapped from, this value would be negative.

token1DeltaAmount.description: The change in quantity of token1. If being swapped from, this value would be negative.

globalSequence.description: A unique identifier used as a cursor during API pagination requests.

token0UsdAmount.description: The dollar-value of token0 being swapped (USD).

token1UsdAmount.description: The dollar-value of token1 being swapped (USD).

feeUsdAmount.description: The dollar-value of the fees charged for this transaction (USD).

poolId.description: Internal unique identifier of a Fraxswap pool

token0Collected.description: The quantity of token 0 collected from the order. Can come from collecting proceeds periodically, or can return unconverted tokens if the order is canceled early.

token0RewardClaimable.description: The quantity of token 0 that has been purchased and is claimable. Value is null when unknown.

token0RemainingToSell.description: The quantity of token 0 that still needs to be sold. Value is null when unknown.

token0SwapAmount.description: The original quantity of token 0 to swap over time.

token1Collected.description: The quantity of token 1 collected from the order. Can come from collecting proceeds periodically, or can return unconverted tokens if the order is canceled early.

token1RewardClaimable.description: The quantity of token 1 that has been purchased and is claimable. Value is null when unknown.

token1RemainingToSell.description: The quantity of token 1 that still needs to be sold. Value is null when unknown.

token1SwapAmount.description: The original quantity of token 1 to swap over time.

lastUpdatedAt.description: The last time the on-chain data was synced to this API.

originalEndAt.description: The original end date of the order. The actual end date could be sooner if canceled.

endAt.description: The actual end date of the order. This will be the cancel date (if canceled) and the expiry date otherwise.

liquidityTransactionCount.description: The number of transactions where liquidity was added or removed.

swapTransactionCount.description: The number of transactions where tokens were swapped/exchanged.

liquidityUsdAmount.description: The total dollar value locked in the pool (USD).

balance.description: The balance of the validator in BigInt format with 9 digits of precision.

balanceDec.description: The balance of the validator parsed as decimals.

effectiveBalance.description: The effective balance of the validator in BigInt format with 9 digits of precision.

effectiveBalanceDec.description: The effective balance of the validator parsed as decimals.

blocksProposed.description: The number of blocks the validator has proposed.

feesReceived.description: The amount of fees earned from tips associated with blocks the validator has proposed.

estimatedActivationTimestamp.description: The estimated timestamp that the validator will become active after waiting its turn in the activation queue.

otherLsdExchangeRates.description: The exchange rate of other LSDs from their oracles, denominated in each respective LSD.

items.description: List of frxETH and sfrxETH summary info.

countryDistributionPerc.description: Percentage of validators by ISO 3166-1 alpha-3 country code. UNK if missing/unknown. Expressed as a percentage (100% = 100.00).

consensusClientDistributionPerc.description: Percentage of validators by consensus client (e.g. lighthouse/prysm). "unknown" if missing/unknown. Expressed as a percentage (100% = 100.00).

id.description: Index of the bond for a particular factory address. The first bond starts with an `id` of `0` and it increments for each new bond after.

priceDecay.description: Price decay, (wei per second), using 1e18 precision
Price decay, (wei per second), using 1e18 precision

price.description: The price of the FXB from a variety of sources, including Curve and auction transactions.

ytm.description: The yield to maturity of the FXB based on the price and time remaining.

circulatingSupply.description: The total supply that is not held by Frax-protocol-related contracts/addresses. I.e., the supply held by users.

totalSupply.description: The total supply of the ERC20 FXB token.

fxbs.description: Array of FXBs included in the response, formatted as their maturity date yyyy-MM-dd.

items.description: Array of historical FXB summary stats.

cycleKey.description: The unique identifier of the cycle voting period.

startingTimestampSec.description: The timestamp (seconds) when the voting period begins.

startingTimestamp.description: The timestamp (ISO) when the voting period begins.

endingTimestampSec.description: The timestamp (seconds) when the voting period ends.

endingTimestamp.description: The timestamp (ISO) when the voting period ends.

startingBlock.description: The block number at which the voting period begins.

endingBlock.description: The block number at which the voting period ends.

isActive.description: Indicates whether the voting cycle is active at the time of this request.

isFuture.description: Indicates whether the voting cycle occurs in the future at the time of this request.

cycles.description: Array containing the start/end times of each gauge voting cycle.

gaugeAddressChecksum.description: The checksum address of the gauge.

gauges.description: Array containing the outcome of historical gauge cycles.

cycles.description: Array containing the outcome of historical gauge cycles.

gauges.description: A list of gauges with a list of voters for each gauge.

transactions.description: A list of transactions that occurred during the gauge cycle voting period.

gaugeAllocation.description: A list of all gauge allocations for the voter.

cycle.description: A collection of key statistics documenting the outcome of a selected gauge cycle.

voters.description: A list of voters and their weights.

transactions.description: A list of transactions that occurred during the gauge cycle voting period.

gauges.description: A list of all gauge allocations at midnight UTC.

days.description: A list of days within the gauge cycle.

voters.description: List of voting and non-voting veFXS addresses.

extra.description: Extra FPI/FPIS summary data not included in historical datasets.

items.description: List of FPI and FPIS summary info.

categoryKey.description: The unique identifier of the income/expense source.

safeSubmittedAt.description: ISO Date/Time of the original Safe transaction if it exists. Otherwise is `null`.Transactions submitted directly to the governor would not have a Safe transaction.

safeVetoSubmittedAt.description: ISO Date/Time of the veto transaction if it exists. Otherwise is `null`.

votesFor.description: The veFXS voting weight in favor of the proposal.

votesAgainst.description: The veFXS voting weight against the proposal.

votesAbstain.description: The veFXS voting weight abstaining from voting for the proposal.

votesTotal.description: The total veFXS voted toward the proposal.

quorum.description: The minimum amount of voting weight for the proposal to be valid.Alpha proposals have a very high quorum, while Omega proposals have a lower one.

proposals.description: Array of frxGov proposal summary items.

assets.description: List of frxUSD balance sheet assets.

liabilities.description: List of frxUSD balance sheet liabilities.

assets.description: List of sfrxUSD balance sheet assets.

liabilities.description: List of sfrxUSD balance sheet liabilities.

assets.description: List of Legacy Frax Dollar balance sheet assets.

liabilities.description: List of Legacy Frax Dollar balance sheet liabilities.
